## Introduction

This is a short report about the **Palmer Penguins** dataset.
The data contains measurements for three penguin species:

- *Adelie*
- *Chinstrap*
- *Gentoo*

You can find more information about the data on the
[palmerpenguins website](https://allisonhorst.github.io/palmerpenguins/).

## Data overview


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
head(penguins)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  species    island bill_len bill_dep flipper_len body_mass    sex year
1  Adelie Torgersen     39.1     18.7         181      3750   male 2007
2  Adelie Torgersen     39.5     17.4         186      3800 female 2007
3  Adelie Torgersen     40.3     18.0         195      3250 female 2007
4  Adelie Torgersen       NA       NA          NA        NA   <NA> 2007
5  Adelie Torgersen     36.7     19.3         193      3450 female 2007
6  Adelie Torgersen     39.3     20.6         190      3650   male 2007
```


:::
:::


The dataset contains 344 penguins
from 3 species.

## Analysis


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](penguin_report_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(penguins, aes(x = species, y = body_mass, fill = species)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Species", y = "Body mass (g)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](penguin_report_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
